description: fit a physical model; expect rel-residual <= 0.15

checks.name: rel_residual
checks.detail: rms residual = 0.833 of the signal energy

retests.name: residual_whiteness
retests.description: test whether the residual is structureless (noise)
retests.conclusion: fit passes, but the residual retains structure: small unmodeled component

retests.name: segment_stationarity
retests.description: fit each time segment separately and compare the fit quality
retests.conclusion: each time segment fits on its OWN but the whole does not -> NON-STATIONARY: the system parameters change between the halves

attempts.notes: coherent residual: model does not explain the data; escalated
